summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with industry experience designing scalable AI models, agentic workflows, and production-ready machine learning systems. Delivered a real-time conversational AI platform (~4–5s end-to-end latency), a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system in production, and a rigorous ML experimentation pipeline achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC. Proficient in Python, statistical modeling, and quantitative data analysis; eager to apply AI-driven methods at the intersection of quantitative finance and artificial intelligence.

skills.languages: Python, SQL, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, HuggingFace Transformers, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Large Language Models (LLMs), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Statistical Modeling, Quantitative Analysis, Experimental Design, Computer Vision, Semantic Search, Vector Embeddings, Prompt Engineering, Model Fine-tuning, NumPy, Pandas
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Pinecone, FAISS, Git
